allow: PowerShell($gh = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($gh\) { $gh.Source } else { "not found" }; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
PowerShell($out = git ls-remote origin 2>&1 | Out-String; if \($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0\) { "AUTH OK"; \($out -split "`n"\).Count - 1; "ref lines above" } else { "AUTH FAILED exit=$LASTEXITCODE"; $out })
